CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerEnterEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
if event.TriggerBodyEntity.Name == "Switch_bridge1" then if self.Target ~= nil then local tweenLine = self.Target.TweenLineComponent --if tweenLine == nil then -- tweenLine = self.Target:AddComponent(TweenLineComponent) --end
tweenLine.Positions:Clear() tweenLine.Positions:Add(Vector2(0, 0)) tweenLine.Positions:Add(Vector2(-3, 0)) -- 숫자 높일수록 더 천천히 이동 tweenLine.Duration = 8 tweenLine.StopType = TweenLinearStopType.RepeatRoundTrip tweenLine.AutoStart = true end end

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerLeaveEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code: if event.TriggerBodyEntity.Name == "Switch_bridge1" then if self.Target ~= nil then --wait(6) --self.Target.Enable = true end end
